'''Loiric Kaan''' was the [[Supreme Commander (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|Supreme Commander]] of the ''[[Yammka's Mount]]'', the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of [[Warmaster]] [[Nas Choka]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]'s [[Defense of Mon Calamari (Yuuzhan Vong War)|assault]] on [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]]. When he made no useful tactical suggestions but merely assured Yuuzhan Vong victory with empty words, the Warmaster had guards escort Loiric from the command chamber.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{1st}}
